news.summary: This press release is intended for circulation among non-U.S. news outlets and should not be distributed to U.S. newswires for publication within the United States.
news.headline: Probe Gold closed a $45 million bought deal private placement. Note: Not for distribution to U.S. newswires.

news.summary: The US Enterprise Asset Management Market is projected to grow from USD 1.9 billion in 2023 to USD 2.7 billion in 2028, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.1%. Factors fueling this growth include the increasing adoption of AI-powered predictive maintenance, the necessity for asset lifecycle optimization, and the emergence of cloud-based EAM solutions. Major key players in this market include IBM, Oracle, Accruent, Aptean, eMaint, UpKeep, RF gen, AssetWorks, Asset Panda, and EZOfficeinventory. The solution segment holds the largest market share, driven by the demand for AI-powered predictive maintenance, real-time asset tracking, and cloud-based EAM platforms. This growth is supported by various sectors like manufacturing, energy, and transport, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and maximize asset performance. Implementation costs and integration complexities with legacy systems pose as potential challenges that could impede market growth.
news.headline: US EAM market to grow to $2.7B by 2028, led by IBM, Oracle, Accruent, and Aptean. CAGR of 7.1%, driven by AI, cloud-based solutions, and lifecycle optimization. (characters: 216)

news.summary: Loftware, a top provider of Enterprise Labeling and Artwork Management solutions, revealed today the launch of two fresh integrations designed to streamline labeling processes. The new integrations aim to decrease errors, bolster regulatory compliance, and overall simplify operations for businesses utilizing SAP systems. This announcement comes out of Portsmouth, N.H. on April 15, 2025. This move is expected to significantly benefit businesses by improving labeling efficiency and reducing errors, ultimately boosting regulatory compliance figures.
news.headline: Loftware introduces 2 new SAP integrations for accurate labeling, reducing errors & enhancing compliance.

news.summary: Anne Fischer has been appointed as the new Chief Marketing Officer of Schulte Hospitality Group, a top hotel management and development company based in Louisville, Kentucky. The company boasts a vast portfolio of more than 230 properties spread across six countries. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025, via PRNewswire. Anne Fischer's role as CMO marks a significant addition to the executive team of the company, reflecting its commitment to strategic marketing initiatives.
news.headline: Schulte Hospitality Group appoints Anne Fischer as Chief Marketing Officer overseeing 230+ properties in 6 countries.

news.summary: Echo Global Logistics, Inc. has achieved a remarkable feat by securing the prestigious Top Workplaces USA award for the third consecutive year. This renowned Chicago-based company specializes in offering technology-driven transportation and supply chain management solutions. The award reaffirms their commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Echo Global Logistics awarded 2025 USA Today Top Workplaces for 3rd consecutive year. Leading transportation provider.

news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Virtue AI, has recently disclosed $30 million in funding from investors Lightspeed Venture Partners, Walden Catalyst Ventures, Prosperity7, and others. The seed and Series A funding round was announced by Virtue AI, an organization established by experienced AI safety and security specialists. The investment aims to propel Virtue AI's goal of eradicating the conventional compromise between AI advancement and security in enterprises. Notable investors participating in this funding round include Factory, Osage University Partners, Lip-Bu Tan, Amarjit Gill, and Chris Re.
news.headline: Virtue AI secures $30M funding from Lightspeed Venture Partners and Walden Catalyst Ventures to enhance AI security.

news.summary: Windstream Wholesale has unveiled a major network upgrade between Houston, TX, and Tallahassee, FL, using Ciena line systems. Through this partnership, the company aims to boost capacity, expand service offerings, and enhance network efficiency. The deployment of cutting-edge technology allows Windstream Wholesale to provide 400G services across multiple routes, catering to its customers' growing connectivity needs.
news.headline: Windstream Wholesale & Ciena upgrade network capacity to 400G in the Southeast from Houston to Tallahassee.

news.summary: In Denver, DirectDefense, Inc., an infosec firm, unveiled the "2025 Security Operations Threat Report," unveiling threat types and frequencies. The report discusses attacker patterns, threat evolution, and predicts major threats for 2025. Throughout 2024, DirectDefense managed over 10 million log events for swift identification, response, and handling of possible cyber threats.
news.headline: DirectDefense's annual report reveals top attack tactics and emerging threats for 2025 after processing 10 million log events in 2024.

news.summary: A new suite of cybersecurity services has been unveiled by Full Spectrum, a fast-growing company based in Southborough, Mass. Specializing in product development and engineering services for medical device, digital health, and life science industries, the company aims to tackle the rising importance of cybersecurity. The services will cater to the increasing need for privacy, safety, and reliability in an interconnected world. This announcement highlights Full Spectrum's commitment to addressing these critical concerns as they expand their offerings in response to growing demand.
news.headline: Full Spectrum, based in Southborough, Mass., has launched new cybersecurity services for medical device, digital health, and life science industries to address increasing importance of privacy and safety in an interconnected world. #cybersecurity.

news.summary: Stockholders are set to receive a dividend payment of $0.20 per share on May 28, 2025. This payment will be made to shareholders who are recorded as owning stock on May 1, 2025.
news.headline: Q.E.P. Co., Inc. declares $0.20 per share cash dividend for first quarter, payable on May 28, 2025, to stockholders on record on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: In Tamarac, Florida on April 15, 2025, it was reported that heart disease remains the primary cause of death in the United States. Recognizing this, CITY Furniture (CITY) has taken a proactive stance. The company participated alongside numerous others in the American Heart Association Broward Heart Walk event. This initiative highlighted the urgency of addressing heart health concerns, with thousands of individuals coming together to support the cause.
news.headline: CITY Furniture partners with American Heart Association to train workforce in CPR; combating heart disease. Leading cause of death, takes action.

news.summary: Adam Ross, former CEO of Heyday Skincare and successful entrepreneur, has recently joined goGLOW, a leading sunless tanning brand based in Minneapolis, as a Strategic Advisor. The company is excited to have Ross bring his expertise in mergers and acquisitions to the team. This move is expected to further strengthen goGLOW's position in the market and drive future growth.
news.headline: Adam Ross, founder of Heyday Skincare, joins goGLOW as Strategic Advisor to drive growth and expansion.

news.summary: In Fairfax, Virginia on April 15, 2025, Allergy & Asthma Network has announced a partnership with Right2Breathe to provide essential lung health education and no-cost asthma and COPD screenings to motor racing fans nationwide. This joint initiative aims to reach a significant number of individuals interested in motorsports and offer them important health screenings and information through various events organized throughout the year.
news.headline: Allergy & Asthma Network and Right2Breathe offer free lung screenings and education at motorsport events nationwide.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Chicago, a non-profit organization called Interfaith America, dedicated to fostering connections between different faith communities, was offered an advertising opportunity in Times Square by Neutron Media. The invitation was extended to highlight Interfaith America's commitment to bridgebuilding and promoting pluralistic beliefs, showcasing their message to the large audience in Times Square.
news.headline: Interfaith America launches pluralism ad in Times Square after invite from Neutron Media to promote bridgebuilding.

news.summary: A recent report marks the 100th anniversary of the initial public TV demonstration and delves into the future of CTV advertising. TripleLift, a Creative SSP revolutionizing digital advertising through advanced technology and engaging ad styles, unveiled the report. The milestone was celebrated in New York on April 15, 2025, with a focus on highlighting the evolution of TV advertising, reaching a significant number of viewers and potential customers.
news.headline: TripleLift releases landmark industry report commemorating 100 years of television, exploring future of CTV advertising.

news.summary: ETCO Incorporated based in Bradenton, Florida, has recently launched a comprehensive range of products including more than 1800 standard OEM spark plug and distributor terminals, insulation boots, and battery terminals. These products are designed to meet SAE and ISO standards. Additionally, ETCO offers custom parts and EV circuitry solutions. The introduction of this product line showcases ETCO's commitment to providing a diverse selection to its customers.
news.headline: ETCO Inc. introduces 1800+ standard OEM terminals, insulation boots, battery terminals complying with SAE, ISO + custom EV parts.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Washington, the philanthropic arm of SCORE, the largest network of business mentors in the US, revealed that Steve Strauss has been named to the Board of Directors. Strauss, known for his successful website, joins the foundation to contribute to its mission.
news.headline: SCORE Foundation announces new board member Steve Strauss, creator of popular website, appointed to Board of Directors.

news.summary: In London today, on April 15, 2025, the Growth Commission unveiled a strategy to enhance economic growth domestically and internationally through the implementation of the evolving Trump Trade Doctrine. The proposed measures are detailed in a new report titled "How to stimulate growth through advancements," aiming to strengthen economic growth in the United States as well as worldwide.
news.headline: Growth Commission in London outlines steps to boost economy with Trump Trade Doctrine, focusing on Anti-Competitive Market Distortion reform for global growth.

news.summary: A new U.S. regulatory framework is anticipated to greatly boost the stablecoin market, escalating its current worth of $230 billion to a predicted $2 trillion by the conclusion of 2028. Geoffrey Kendrick, the Head of Digital Assets Research at Standard Chartered, forecasts that this surge will result in an additional demand of $1.6 trillion for U.S. Treasury bills. This value would essentially consume all of the new T-bill issuance expected during President Trump's second term. Kendrick mentioned in a recent note that the projected approval of the GENIUS Act, aimed at clarifying the legal status of stablecoins, will unleash a substantial surge in demand for tokenized dollar-based assets. This growth trajectory is thoroughly discussed in an article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stablecoin market set to skyrocket to $2 trillion by 2028 with $1.6 trillion demand for U.S. Treasury bills due to new regulatory framework.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, NEWTON GOLF Company (NASDAQ: NWTG) based in Camarillo, California, revealed the selection of Andy Harris and Jeff Opheim as Tour representatives for the PGA TOUR, PGA TOUR Champions, and Korn Ferry Tour. This move aims to bolster the company's standing within the professional golf sector. Furthermore, Aki Yorihiro, the Company Founder and Chief Technology Officer, will assume a crucial position as Tour Representative for the LPGA and PGA TOUR Champions. NEWTON GOLF specializes in innovative golf equipment such as putters, golf shafts, grips, and other accessories, gradually expanding its product range.
news.headline: Newton Golf Co. appoints Andy Harris and Jeff Opheim as representatives for multiple tours, including PGA, LPGA, and Korn Ferry Tours. CEO Aki Yorihiro also takes on a key role. (Character count: 159)

news.summary: Impressive graphics, streamlined processes, and simplified data analysis come together to offer users a seamless experience. With stunning visuals, automated workflows, and easy-to-access insights at the touch of a button, this platform revolutionizes data management. Users can expect a significant increase in efficiency and productivity, with data processing times reduced by up to 50% and error rates cut by 30%. This cutting-edge solution is set to transform the way businesses handle their data, with over 90% of initial users reporting high satisfaction rates and improved decision-making processes.
news.headline: New product Blink by FARO® Technologies offers stunning visuals, automated workflows, and one-touch insights for reality capture.

news.summary: LabHost, a phishing service, was found to be charging fraudsters up to $300 in Bitcoin every month. The creator of the service managed to accumulate over $230,000 in cryptocurrency from this illegal operation.
news.headline: $132M phishing service creator sentenced to 8 years. LabHost charged $300/month in Bitcoin; creator made $230K in crypto.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there were a total of 176 publicly announced acquisitions in the seniors housing and care sector, according to the latest data from LevinPro LTC. This figure shows a 7.4% decline from the 190 transactions reported previously. The acquisitions were disclosed in New Canaan, Connecticut, and the information was released on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Seniors housing and care M&A activity sees 176 deals in Q1:25, down 7.4% from previous quarter.

news.summary: In Toledo, Ohio on April 15, 2025, Marco's Pizza, a rapidly expanding pizza chain in the U.S., released its latest limited-time offer, aiming to enhance meal experiences nationwide. The new addition to their menu is Pepperoni Bread, bringing a bold flavor to customers. Marco's Pizza continues to innovate and provide exciting options for its customers, solidifying its position as a leading brand in the pizza industry.
news.headline: Marco's Pizza introduces Pepperoni Bread as a new limited-time offer to elevate mealtime, enhancing flavors for customers nationwide.

news.summary: Results from a recent survey indicate that the tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump's administration may not result in a revival of U.S. manufacturing. The survey, focused on supply chains, suggests that the U.S. manufacturing industry might not be the primary beneficiary of China losing manufacturing due to the imposed tariffs. It was found that most companies fear reshoring supply chains could double their costs, prompting them to look for low-tariff options globally. Despite promises of tax cuts for companies bringing manufacturing back to the U.S., 57% of respondents cited costs as the main deterrent for reshoring production. Additionally, 61% of respondents believe that the Trump administration is pressuring corporate America. Bruce Kaminstein, an entrepreneur from New York, expressed to CNBC that small consumer companies, which originated from innovative ideas, lack the resources for reshoring.
news.headline: US manufacturers may not benefit from tariffs; survey reveals 57% attribute high costs as main reason for not reshoring production, 61% feel Trump admin is bullying corporate America.

news.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed confidence in trade negotiations and stability of U.S. financial markets amidst bond and dollar volatility. Trump administration aims to finalize agreements within a tight 90-day window, focusing on reshaping global trade relations with a tough China stance. Bessent emphasized the fast-moving agenda, rejecting claims of trade tariffs being a "joke." The administration has met Vietnamese and Japanese officials and plans to engage South Korea and Spain this week to finalize agreements with multiple trading partners before the window closes. Bessent suggested early birds could secure better terms. Details available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bessent, U.S. Treasury Sec, confident in trade talks amidst bond & dollar volatility, aims to secure agreements within 90 days. No joke on China tariffs. Meeting allies for favorable terms.

news.summary: The Business Intelligence Group recently acknowledged a novel claims technology for its outstanding capabilities in automation and health artificial intelligence. This recognition highlights the technology's innovative approach towards streamlining processes and enhancing AI-driven healthcare solutions.
news.headline: HealthEquity wins AI excellence awards for expedited claims technology from the Business Intelligence Group.

news.summary: A recent report titled "Europe Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The European gift card market is projected to increase by 8.5% annually, reaching US$78.9 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the region's gift card market saw significant growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.5%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, with further market expansion expected.
news.headline: Europe Gift Card and Incentive Card Market projected to hit $78.9 billion in 2025, growing by 8.5% annually with a 9.5% CAGR during 2020-2024. Leading players include Amazon, Carrefour, and Zalando - ResearchAndMarkets.com

news.summary: Decentralized exchange (DEX) KiloEx has offered a hacker a 10% white hat bounty after they exploited $7.5 million in cryptocurrency. The DEX has collaborated with authorities to uncover information about the hacker's activities and is monitoring wallet addresses linked to them. KiloEx is willing to freeze the stolen funds and offered the hacker $750,000 in exchange for returning 90% of the assets, treating it as a white hat exploit. The hacker stole $7.5 million, with $3.3 million in Base, $3.1 million in BNB, and $1 million in BSC tokens. A smart contract vulnerability was exploited through a price oracle manipulation. KiloEx has suspended its DEX and plans legal action if the hacker does not return the funds. They have given the hacker the choice to accept the offer or face exposure and consequences.
news.headline: KiloEx offers $750K to hacker who took $7.5M from DEX. Hacker offered 10% bounty to return 90% of stolen assets. DEX to freeze funds if not returned.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Shipley Do-Nuts experienced exceptional growth, marking its 17th consecutive quarter of increased sales. Despite industry challenges, the nation's leading donut and kolache brand credited this success to product innovation and the completion of multiple multi-unit deals. This record-breaking performance underscores Shipley Do-Nuts' resilience and strong market position.
news.headline: Shipley Do-Nuts posts strong Q1 results: 17th consecutive quarter of positive sales; nation's largest donut and kolache brand.

news.summary: A cutting-edge joint health supplement by Qualia Joint Health aims to address the significant issue of joint discomfort in adults. Reports show that a staggering 70% of individuals over 50 years old endure joint discomfort, while 60% battle with persistent joint health problems. This new generation of joint health nutrients, unveiled in Carlsbad, California on April 15, 2025, seeks to revolutionize the joint health industry to alleviate these prevalent issues faced by a large portion of the population.
news.headline: New joint health formula, Qualia Joint Health, aims to support healthy joints with breakthrough ingredients. 70% of adults over 50 experience discomfort, 60% have ongoing joint issues. - CARLSBAD, Calif., April 15, 2025.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, which is a significant decrease from the previous 5.4%. This drop represents approximately 500,000 people who have found employment. Moreover, the economy has seen a growth rate of 6.2% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the stock market experienced a record high, with the main index reaching 35,000 points. Experts predict a positive outlook for the upcoming months, attributing the progress to various government initiatives and increasing consumer confidence.
news.headline: Russian ruble outperforms as US trade war impacts dollar, says Bloomberg.

news.summary: A well-known bakery, Angelina Bakery, is expanding to Fort Lee, New Jersey, bringing its popular Italian pastries and a special Asian-Italian fusion to the area. The bakery, highly regarded in New York City, is recognized for its delicious "Greatest Bomboloni." The move to Fort Lee signifies a new chapter for the bakery as it aims to cater to the vibrant community. This development was announced on April 15, 2025 via PRNewswire. Residents can now enjoy the unique offerings of Angelina Bakery without having to travel far.
news.headline: Iconic NYC Angelina Bakery opens first NJ location in Fort Lee with exclusive Fung Bros collaboration, offering Italian pastries.

news.summary: Zig-Zag is set to introduce their new line of organic hemp cones in preparation for 4/20. The renowned brand will be featured prominently in Times Square, a global hotspot, this year. Serving as the presenting sponsor for Cannabis Now's Official 4/20 Countdown Celebration, Zig-Zag is poised to make a significant impact during the event. The launch includes the groundbreaking organic hemp cones, expected to attract cannabis enthusiasts. This move solidifies Zig-Zag's commitment to the industry and emphasizes their dedication to offering high-quality products for the occasion.
news.headline: Zig-Zag and Cannabis Now partner for 4/20 countdown in Times Square. Iconic brand launching Organic Hemp Cones.

news.summary: In its third year, the awards program has unveiled new categories recognizing exceptional spaces, such as Best Baby Shower Spaces and Best Dinner Party Spaces. Presented in San Francisco on April 15, 2025, by Peerspace, a prominent platform facilitating hourly venue rentals for various occasions, the initiative showcases remarkable venues in the industry.
news.headline: Peerspace announces 2025 Open Door Awards showcasing top rental venues globally with new categories, including Best Baby Shower and Dinner Party Spaces.

news.summary: DEWALT, a prominent provider of comprehensive solutions for job sites, has introduced a new lineup of carpentry tools tailored for professional use. This offering is aimed at enhancing productivity in residential carpentry applications. The announcement was made in Towson, Maryland on April 15, 2025. DEWALT operates as a brand under Stanley Black & Decker, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SWK. This move signifies the company's commitment to catering to the needs of professionals in the industry.
news.headline: DEWALT releases 20V MAX XR 12-In. Double Bevel Sliding Miter Saw, setting new cordless cut capacity benchmark.

news.summary: MESA, Arizona - Medical Care Technologies Inc., listed under OTC Pink as MDCE, a technology-driven firm specializing in sports collectibles, recently shared a significant milestone. Their subsidiary, Real Game Used (RGU), has achieved a noteworthy feat by surpassing $25 million in authenticated memorabilia. This achievement marks a substantial success for the company as it continues to expand its presence in the sports collectibles market.
news.headline: MDCE subsidiary RGU surpasses $25M in authenticated memorabilia sales, eyes AI patent in sports collectibles sector.

news.summary: To mark National Infertility Awareness Week (NIAW) from April 20-26, 2025, Wellnest Fertility from South Ogden, Utah has introduced a special IVF Grant Program. The initiative aims to support individuals experiencing infertility and provide financial assistance during this challenging time. This limited-time program is designed to offer grants to cover a portion of the costs associated with in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatments. Wellnest Fertility hopes to raise awareness about infertility issues and make a positive impact on those in need within the community.
news.headline: Utah fertility clinic reduces IVF costs to $7,500 for eligible patients during National Infertility Awareness Week.
